query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS identifier VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS identifierType ENUM('email', 'phone') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS passwordHash VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS credits INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 10000;
